name: USDC-vault (thin spread)
recommendations: Thin spread: only ~1.00% of excess basis is paid for the full protocol/depeg risk (basis-to-risk ratio ~0.25). The compensation is slim relative to the risk taken.
Thin compensation: consider a venue with a larger spread or a lower protocol-risk profile to improve the basis-to-risk ratio.

name: Algo-stable farm (generous)
recommendations: Exceptional carry: ~13.00% excess basis is a large multiple of the protocol-risk proxy (ratio ~2.60). Verify the yield source is sustainable before sizing up.
Generous carry: the spread is large relative to the risk proxy — confirm the risk proxy is not understated before treating this as free money.
